summary: Comprehensive testing of ALPHA DROP iteration 5 features completed successfully. All 15 features tested: Admin panel with email/password login (JWT), admin dashboard with stats, subscriber management (grant/deactivate), CSV export endpoints (require auth), updated pricing ($79/$199/$499 + $99 affiliate add-on), 25% beta discount, and PWA manifest. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All admin panel UI elements working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/admin/login with correct credentials returns JWT token
GET /api/admin/me with valid token returns admin info
GET /manifest.json is accessible with correct PWA config
Admin login with correct credentials shows dashboard
Admin dashboard shows Total Products, Explosive, Active Subscribers, Total Revenue stats
Admin dashboard has Grant Subscription form with email input, plan select, and Grant button
Admin tab navigation works (Overview, Subscribers, Users, Payments)
Pricing page shows Affiliate Pro +$99/mo add-on
Login page shows 25% off for life (not 50%)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All admin panel and pricing features working)

seed_data_creation: Test subscriptions created: TEST_grantuser@example.com (Hunter), TEST_deactivateuser@example.com (Scout - cancelled)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully functional at /admin with JWT-based auth (separate from Google OAuth). Admin can view dashboard stats, manage subscribers (grant/deactivate), view users and payments. CSV export endpoints require subscription auth. Pricing updated to $79/$199/$499 + $99 affiliate add-on. Beta discount is 25% off. PWA manifest configured at /manifest.json. All features from iteration 4 still working.
